---
title: "Indeks materiałów"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
search: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=../materials/">
        <link rel="canonical" href="../materials/">
---

```{=html}
<script>
  window.location.replace("../materials/");
</script>
```

Przejdź do [indeksu materiałów](../materials/).
